pageHeader.title: QR Code Generator
pageHeader.description: Create QR codes for text, URLs, Wi‑Fi, email, phone, and SMS

qrFields.textPlaceholder: One line = one QR code. Paste or type multiple lines to batch generate.

qrPreview.title: QR preview
qrPreview.empty: Generated QR codes will appear here.

qrHistory.title: History (this device)
qrHistory.empty: No items yet. Generated codes appear here (max 1000, oldest removed first).
qrHistory.clearConfirmBody: This removes all saved QR entries from this browser. This cannot be undone.

errors.title: Error
errors.copyFailed: Failed to copy to clipboard. Please try again.
errors.qrRenderFailed: Could not render QR code. Try shorter content or a different format.
errors.qrTextTooLong: Text is too long for a reliable QR code.
errors.qrTextBatchTooMany: Text batch is limited to {{max}} lines per run.
errors.qrUrlInvalid: That URL does not look valid.
errors.qrWifiPasswordRequired: Enter a password for this security type (or choose “None”).
errors.qrSmsNumberEmpty: Enter a phone number for SMS.
